Activity · 3mo
A — Indigo Void
Deep cosmic void. Indigo + violet orbs at 5–6% opacity, top-left and top-right corners. Coldest, most focused feel — clinical precision. Cards are very near-black with a hairline indigo edge highlight.

Best for: focus sessions, exam mode, night studying.
#3B5AFF indigo #7C3AED violet #4F46E5 bottom
B — Arctic Cyan
Clean polar atmosphere. Cyan + sky blue halos at 4–5% opacity — like winter starlight. Cards have an icy top-edge shimmer. Feels the most native-iOS, clinical-white-space coded.

Best for: default day-to-day use, reading, quiz sessions.
#0EA5E9 sky #06B6D4 cyan #6366F1 base
C — Nebula Drift
Warm galaxy. Purple + fuchsia nebula clouds at 4–5% opacity. The warmest dark mode — feels alive. Cards have a violet inner haze. Most editorial and engaging.

Best for: dashboard overview, motivational displays, streaks.
#A855F7 purple #EC4899 fuchsia #A78BFA lavender
